halt_reason: Cumulative tokens ~50M — hit D-ρ.max_tokens_total threshold. Closing Round 5 with honest validation numbers (v4: AL 39.9%, BL 54.9%) and committed bug fixes. Earlier v2 result (AL 64% lead) was inflated by broken test collection that's been fixed in Round 5.

last_validation.decision: AL still trails BL by 15pp at validation, BUT this is the FIRST honest measurement. v2's AL 64% was inflated by broken test collection (pyjwt scored 100% on a single dummy test). Round 5's fixes (revert bug + H12 dangling + src-layout inject-paths) restored proper test collection, increased denominator, exposed real AL gap.

honest_regressions_in_v4.pyjwt: 100% → 12.2% (v2 inflated by collection bug — only 1 test/cell. v4 collects ~100)
honest_regressions_in_v4.cachetools: 94.4% → 86.2% (smoke v5 showed 97.2%; k=1 variance, not a real regression)

deprecated.note: BL hit 99.4% at iter 1 then regressed to 89.5% at iter 2

voluptuous.note: AL inject collected only 1/149 tests — needs investigation

staged_commits.name: H4_imports_keyword
staged_commits.decision_rationale: AL TOTAL Δ +1.3pp ≥ -2pp threshold. No per-repo regression. BL bounced +4.3pp from k=1 variance, widening visual tax_pp gap but the locked fitness signal is AL final-iter pass% (D-σ), which improved. ACCEPT and continue.

staged_commits.name: H5_constant_keyword
staged_commits.decision_rationale: AL TOTAL Δ +4.9pp clearly above threshold; cachetools AL jumped +8.8pp. BL dropped -14pp from k=1 cell variance on deprecated (153/171 → 69/171, same total tests, same prompt — pure LLM output variance). D-σ keys on AL only, so accept. Tax_pp closed 26.3 → 7.4 — visually striking but partly inflated by BL bounce.

staged_commits.name: H6_class_skeleton_compression
staged_commits.decision_rationale: AL Δ = 0.0pp exactly matches baseline preview (179/215, 67/171, 0/1). No quality regression but no quality lift either — gpt-5.4 at temperature=0 produced equivalent code for these 3 cells regardless of class-stub format. The win is structural: -3500 lines (~10%) across 16 skeletons, biggest in jinja (-751), imapclient (-682), babel (-478). Lower prompt cost during the upcoming validation tier. ACCEPT and trigger validation per D-τ (3 consecutive accepts).

rejected_hypotheses.name: H2_preserve_working_code_prompt
rejected_hypotheses.decision_rationale: AL final regressed -4.2pp (over -2pp threshold). Helped best-iter signal (+4.9pp AL, -11pp tax_pp_best). May revisit at k=3 validation tier where variance is lower.

metrics_history.notes: voluptuous: 0/0 due to ReadTimeout (4 attempts × 120s). Increasing HTTP timeout to 300s and re-running.

voluptuous.note: still inject failure: `raises` decorator not produced in schema_builder.py; pre-existing, not caused by H4

deprecated.note: BL regressed -49.1pp vs baseline (89.5→40.4) — pure k=1 cell variance; same prompt, same test_total=171, just different LLM output
BL again deviates from Round 0.6 baseline (89.5 → 43.9); BL is the noisiest signal at k=1

decisions_locked.D-ρ_stop_multi: first of: 3 consecutive rejects / target met / 15 rounds / 50M tokens / 8 hours
decisions_locked.D-υ_concision_metric: skeleton .al total lines ≤ stripped .py total lines
